public_home.reason: The home page is navigation, not an independent machine action; its actionable advisories, due dates, downloads, search, law, and help surfaces are cataloged separately.

recover_password.reason: GST requires an OTP sent through the account recovery channel before new credentials can be set; AgentWeb must pause for the user to enter it.

recover_username.reason: GST requires an OTP sent to the registered contact before revealing a username; AgentWeb must pause for the account holder.

resume_registration.reason: GST requires a visual CAPTCHA before a TRN application can be resumed, followed by account-bound verification; AgentWeb must show the challenge and pause for the user.

revoke_cancelled_registration.reason: No mapping account with the required GST role is currently available.

search_advance_ruling.reason: GST requires a visual CAPTCHA before exposing advance-ruling search filters and results; AgentWeb must show the challenge and resume after the user completes it.

search_bill_of_entry.reason: No mapping account with the required GST role is currently available.

search_composition_taxpayer.reason: The live composition opt-in/opt-out search requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after its search mode is selected. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.

search_taxpayer_gstin.reason: The live public GSTIN/UIN lookup renders a required six-digit image CAPTCHA after a valid identifier is entered. AgentWeb must pause for the user to complete it visibly and must not automate or bypass it.

search_taxpayer_pan.reason: The live public PAN lookup requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after a syntactically valid PAN is entered. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.

search_temporary_id.reason: The public temporary-ID/mobile search displays a required six-character image CAPTCHA before submission. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.

start_new_registration.reason: GST sends separate OTPs to the applicant email address and mobile number before registration can continue; AgentWeb can fill the form but must pause for the applicant.

track_refund_application.reason: A valid refund ARN with known case history from an authorized mapping account is required; only the no-record error path has been verified.

track_registration_application.reason: The live public ARN/SRN/FRN status lookup requires a six-character image CAPTCHA after an identifier is entered. AgentWeb must pause for visible user completion and must not automate the challenge.
